title: AI Lead Rescue hero — Mauritius spa at sunset
description: Full-bleed photo+glass hero background for the main AI Lead Rescue page (/lead-rescue): a calm, premium Mauritius beachside spa setting at sunset — twin treatment beds with rolled towels and frangipani flowers, tiki torches, palms, and a tranquil lagoon with Le Morne in the distance. Warm, human, restrained-luxury; no identifiable people, no PII. Responsive AVIF/WebP/JPG derivatives (desktop + 768w mobile).

provenance.supplied_by: Anton (operator) — AI-generated, supplied via chat for the dark photo+glass alignment of the main /lead-rescue page
provenance.optimised_with: sharp (jpeg mozjpeg q80, webp q78, avif q50) via scripts/optimize-lead-rescue-spa-hero.mjs
provenance.verification_status: DRAFT placeholder. AI-generated; the supplied source is only 1024x687 (below the >=2400x1600 target for a crisp full-bleed desktop background) and carries a small 'Mauritius' script watermark in the lower-right. Also note this is a wellness/hospitality-Mauritius scene on an otherwise pan-vertical page — confirm it is the intended brand direction for the main funnel. Replace with a clean, provenance-confirmed, higher-resolution master before lifecycle.state=published.
provenance.lifecycle_note: Held at lifecycle.state=draft so selectLeadRescueAssets() never auto-selects it into the in-flow lead_rescue_hero slot; this asset is consumed only as the static full-bleed shell background via components/AiLeadRescueLanding.js.

licence.terms: AI-generated image supplied by the operator for use as the main /lead-rescue page hero. Treated as a draft placeholder; confirm AI-generation rights, remove the watermark, and replace with an approved >=2400px master before production sign-off. No identifiable people, no PII.

accessibility.alt: Calm Mauritius beachside spa at sunset: twin treatment beds with rolled towels and frangipani flowers, tiki torches, palms, and a tranquil lagoon with a mountain in the distance.

usage.notes: slot:lead_rescue_hero_background. Full-bleed fixed background under a dark-tinted scrim via PublicMarketingPhotoGlassShell; rendered decoratively (alt="") because the surrounding copy carries the meaning. Dark frosted-glass panels sit above it. REPLACEMENT: to change the hero, add a new derivative set and a new manifest id (e.g. lead-rescue-spa-sunset-hero-v2), then retire this one — never overwrite a published path.
